item.title: Jack Purcell Meats collapses amid mounting pressure on family food businesses
item.description: The business grew into a juggernaut of more than 20 stores before mounting pressure and court action brought it undone.

item.title: Bluey fans queue for hours to snap up limited edition $2 dollarbucks available at Australia Post
item.description: The limited-edition coins are already being resold for eye-watering prices online.

item.title: Nikita Tszyu takes down tough Spaniard Oscar Diaz during super-welterweight fight
item.description: The Aussie had to quickly apologies but his rival’s team was ‘very unhappy’.

item.title: Middle East war: Peace hopes revived as Iran reviews new US proposal to end conflict
item.description: Donald Trump issued a stark warning amid a stalemate over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Mary Fowler crowned Women’s Super League champion as fellow Matildas suffer heartbreak
item.description: The superstar has officially ended Sam Kerr’s reign as champion after one Aussie ended the dreams of three more.

item.title: Jacinta Allan steps in to overturn Fed Square’s Socceroos ban ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: The Victorian premier has vowed not to let ‘a few d***heads’ ruin the World Cup for everyone.

item.title: Major data breach as private information of Australian students and teachers leaked
item.description: ‘This incident has impacted thousands of educational institutions.’

item.title: Did the PNG Chiefs’ latest PR stunt lean into their biggest concern?
item.description: Questions still linger after one glaring omission from the NRL expansion club’s charm offensive.

item.title: Woolworths brings back soft plastics recycling
item.description: Collection points will be available in 700 stores across five states.

item.title: Passenger killed in sinking car identified as young Western Sydney cricketer Mohammad Kashif
item.description: ‘His sudden passing has left a deep void, both emotionally and financially.’

item.title: South Australia snares Australian Open golf tournament but LIV Golf questions linger
item.description: Premier Peter Malinauskas has secured another sporting event as he admits he is ‘not naive’ to fears over LIV Golf’s future.

item.title: Brisbane hoon blitz sees eight arrested and two Ford Falcons seized after dangerous Gateway Bridge incident
item.description: Dozens of fines have been issued and cars seized in Queensland as police make a vow.

item.title: Much-loved jockey Braidon Small claims fairytale win on Instigator in Grand Annual Steeplechase
item.description: The inspirational hero won by the narrowest of margins in Australia’s most gruelling race.

item.title: What Avril Lavigne can teach Treasurer Jim Chalmers ahead of federal budget
item.description: Why’d the government have to go and make things so complicated?

item.title: WA Budget: Free fuel and family handouts as state posts big surplus
item.description: More than two million motorists will benefit.

item.title: Iconic singer Bonnie Tyler placed in induced coma following emergency surgery
item.description: ‘All of her family, friends and fans will be concerned about this news.’

item.title: Tennis stars threaten to boycott French Open over prize money
item.description: ‘It’s not nice that after one year we are not even close to a conclusion.’

item.title: Former Australian Test batter Marcus North set to be appointed England national selector
item.description: It is the first time an Australian has held such a key role in England’s inner-sanctum.

item.title: Forgotten Aussie tennis star Alexei Popyrin returns with a bang in Italian Open
item.description: The Australian No.2 has been going through tennis hell, and even stepped away from the game.

item.title: The Only Way Is Essex star Jake Hall dies at the age of 35 in freak accident at a ‘wild party’ in Spain
item.description: The 35-year-old posted a tragic message on social media hours before his death.

item.title: Family update on toddler left fighting for life after inhaling metallic cake decorating powder
item.description: Young Dustin fell critically ill in a terrifying ordeal for his parents.

item.title: Celebrated naturalist David Attenborough turns 100
item.description: The filmmaker and conservationist has revealed his favourite place on the planet.

item.title: Adrian Portelli’s wild behind-the-scenes stunt revealed after bathroom slammed by My Reno Rules judges
item.description: The billionaire took matters into his own hands to make a controversial ‘fix’.

item.title: Prince George, Princess Charlotte and Prince Louis choose ‘brilliant name’ for new kangaroo joey at Australia Zoo
item.description: The latest collaboration further highlights the growing bond between the two families.

item.title: Communications Minister Anika Wells forced to repay more than $10k after travel audit uncovers rule breaches
item.description: The federal minister apologised for what she described as ‘honest mistakes’.

item.title: Matildas rising star Jada Whyman anounces ‘very sad’ decision to pause career amid knee injury struggles
item.description: A lengthy silence has been broken after a ‘freak’ accident cruelled the biggest moment of her career.

item.title: Patti Newton reveals touching final promise she made to late husband Bert Newton
item.description: The veteran performer also opened up about her blossoming friendship with a fellow iconic star.

item.title: 'ISIS bride' Janai Safar fails in NSW court bid for freedom as Kawsar Ahmad and Zeinab Ahmad remanded in custody in Melbourne
item.description: She was charged with entering a prohibited area and being a member of a terrorist organisation.

item.title: Queensland students unable to submit assignments after cyber attack forces shutdown of QLearn and Canvas
item.description: Hackers accessed data linked to 1300 schools, leaving thousands scrambling to submit assignments and access coursework.

item.title: Three hikers killed in Mount Dukono volcano eruption in Indonesia
item.description: Mount Dukono has spewed a column of ash 10km into the sky.

item.title: Royals lead tributes for Sir David Attenborough's 100th birthday
item.description: ‘Happy 100th Birthday to our National Treasure.’

item.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to three-day ceasefire as Donald Trump confirms major prisoner exchange
item.description: The truce comes as peace talks stall and both sides continue accusing each other of violating past ceasefires.

item.title: Mother’s Day joy for family of Perth boy Cruz Kelly fighting rare brain tumour
item.description: As he battles a rare and aggressive brain cancer, Cruz Kelly has taught his mum the power in seeking out joy during times of deep sadness and fear.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor set to give evidence in UK court after man accused of threatening behaviour near Sandringham estate
item.description: A man accused of intimidating Andrew near the Sandringham estate has been banned from approaching royal residences before the high-profile trial.

item.title: Spain prepares emergency evacuation of more than 140 passengers from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship after three deaths onboard
item.description: Authorities are scrambling to trace passengers across multiple countries after the deadly outbreak onboard the MV Hondius.

item.title: Australians want immediate relief from the budget, but economists warn the biggest fixes could take years
item.description: From fuel prices and tax offsets to housing and healthcare, economists say some of the budget measures Australians notice first may not deliver lasting relief.

item.title: Bathurst seeks $70 million for Mount Panorama upgrades
item.description: A funding push for upgrades to the Mount Panorama circuit has been put forward after years of setbacks for the hallowed venue.

item.title: Pentagon releases new UFO files as Trump administration promises ‘maximum transparency’ on unexplained sightings
item.description: The US military says is allowing the public to ‘make up their own minds’.

item.title: Alex de Minaur reduced to racquet-smashing frustration as alarming slump continues at Italian Open
item.description: It was another dispiriting setback for the Aussie as he clumped to a three-year low.

item.title: Trump warns expanded US naval operation could return if Iran peace talks fail but Tehran could withstand for months
item.description: But the US President says if talks fail, the country may reintroduce ‘Project Freedom’.

item.title: IKEA urgently recalls garlic press after fears metal fragments could break off into food
item.description: Customers have been told to stop using the item immediately after a production fault raised fears small metal pieces could be swallowed.

item.title: Farrer by-election: One Nation’s David Farley sweeps key seat in upset to Liberal heartland
item.description: ‘In the Australian democracy, One Nation has reached the end of its beginning.’

item.title: NSW pours $39.3m into Firearms Registry to enforce tough new gun laws after Bondi terror attack
item.description: It follows the state introducing the toughest gun law reforms in the wake of the terror tragedy.

item.title: Four Australians aboard deadly hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius as DFAT examines repatriation options
item.description: ‘Our priority is the safety of the community.’

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Mortgage change that could save you $11,000 in two years as interest rates rise again
item.description: One financial expert says Aussies should take a day off work to make the change.

item.title: Hundreds of Brisbane teens run riot after failed Scientology ‘speedrun’ attempt
item.description: A viral TikTok trend has sparked chaos with hundreds of teenagers storming the streets after attempting to breach the church.

item.title: Former Ironman champion Guy Leech launches new longevity program for everyday Australians
item.description: ‘There’s no magic bullet when it comes to health.’

item.title: Albanese Government unveils $2b housing infrastructure push to unlock 65,000 homes ahead of 2026 Federal Budget
item.description: ‘Right now, it’s too hard for too many Australians to get into their own home and get ahead, and that’s why we’re investing in supply.’

item.title: World Health Organisation chief addresses COVID trauma amid global hantavirus fears as MV Hondius approaches the docks of Tenerife
item.description: As passengers get ready to disembark the virus-hit ship, legitimate concerns have been linked to the impacts of COVID.

item.title: 11 babies in 12 months: Inside the growing 7NEWS Melbourne family balancing breaking news and parenthood this Mother’s Day
item.description: To celebrate Mother’s Day, eight members of the team came together for a special newsroom photoshoot with their babies.

item.title: 7NEWS Spotlight: Big Tobacco whistleblower Jeffrey Wigand sounds alarm on Big Tech
item.description: The insider who exposed cigarettes now claims Silicon Valley is hooking a new generation.

item.title: Warning for all women this Mother’s Day as fit mum of four rushed in for emergency heart surgery: ‘Check your heart’
item.description: The cyclist went for tests after a friend suffered a cardiac arrest. Within days, she was rushed into open heart surgery.

item.title: Relative calm in Strait of Hormuz as US awaits Iranian response on peace deal
item.description: A Qatari LNG tanker is heading to the Strait of Hormuz, and could mark the nation’s first transit since the conflict erupted.

item.title: Simone Callahan opens up about moment she found out Shane Warne died, son Jackson makes devastating admission
item.description: The family has opened up, revealing devastating details about his death.

item.title: Twelve police killed in car bomb and shootout in northwest Pakistan
item.description: Militants rammed into a police post in an explosive-filled car and begun firing, killing at least a dozen officers.

item.title: Hantavirus cruise ship arrives in Tenerife, passengers begin disembarking
item.description: Four Australians are among those due to be evacuated.

item.title: Josh Rachele seals Adelaide win over Richmond with shot from 50 after free kick in dying minutes
item.description: Richmond fans were irate when Josh Rachele sealed the game - and then rubbed salt into the Tiger wounds.

item.title: Strait of Malacca: The critical trade route you’ve never heard of
item.description: ‘If we do have a large-scale maritime conflict, then choke points such as the Malacca Strait will be a focus.’

item.title: Rugby league greats Mark ‘Spud’ Carroll and James Graham secure free medical screenings for all retired NRL and NRLW players
item.description: A pair of rugby league greats felt compelled to take action when they made a ‘shock’ discovery.

item.title: Sydney-based small business owner extorted over fake one-star Google reviews
item.description: ‘It‘s not right the way Google controls it and doesn’t really care.’

item.title: MV Hondius: Four Australians aboard hantavirus ship to be repatriated on government charter flight
item.description: Three people died aboard the MV Hondius after it left Argentina last month.

item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Mary Fowler miracle strike sparks devastation for benched Sam Kerr as all-Aussie FA Cup final set
item.description: Goal-scoring star Sam Kerr was helpless as Chelsea coughed up a semi-final win after she was pulled from the pitch.

item.description: ‘Geez, it must be going well. I’ll just say that.’

item.description: ‘I woke up this morning probably feeling worse than I did the last few days.’

item.title: Doctors reveal how hantavirus spreads as Australian passengers leave the MV Hondius
item.description: Gene Hackman’s wife was killed by hantavirus but the strain behind a cruise ship outbreak is more dangerous. Here’s why.

item.description: Iran’s response to a US-issued peace deal did not sit well with the US president.

item.description: The singer could be in line for a huge payout.

item.description: He served five months behind bars for attempting to pervert the course of justice.

item.description: ‘It’s been a nightmare for the family.’

item.title: Aussie tennis greats pay tribute as much-loved champion Mal Anderson dies aged 91
item.description: ‘Tennis in Australia has lost one of its greats, and a lot of us have lost a mate and mentor. I feel very lucky to have known him.’

item.description: The 19-year-old is in the mix for an international debut while Glenn Maxwell is out as he focuses on franchise cricket.

item.description: Harry Scott is ready for his chance after watching three former teammates become AFL players.

item.description: ‘There’s plenty of work to do but we’ve got targets in mind and big focus points.’

item.description: The charges are the first under major changes to Queensland’s laws.

item.description: ‘Sounds about right. Do exactly the opposite of what the public want.’

item.description: ‘We’re all encouraged to coach each other and keep each other to a high standard.’

item.title: Toyota Tundra price slashed by thousands in runout offer
item.description: Toyota is waiving on-road costs and throwing in an additional $10,000 discount on its full-size Tundra pickup until the end of the financial year.

item.description: Julian Ingram vanished from the remote NSW country town in January after killing three people, including his pregnant ex.

item.description: The superstar is free to play after contact was deemed ‘inevitable’.

item.title: Electric Ford utes converted by defunct Aussie firm resurface at Eagers dealers
item.description: An Eagers-owned dealership network has obtained a bulk order of Ford F-150 Lightning EVs converted to right-hand drive by AUSEV, which went into receivership in March.

item.description: The French brand’s boss wants more GTi hot hatches but said a new 308 GTi won’t necessarily use electric power, and it definitely won’t be an SUV.

item.description: Disaster struck when the young boy’s backpack became stuck between carriages.

item.description: Is it a Rolls? Is it a Rangie? No, it's a Zeekr! The all-new 9X blends wild straight-line go with opulent luxury – and could be cheaper than a BMW X5.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Treasurer Jim Chalmers to unveil budget with $45 billion upgrade to bottom line
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Donald Trump says US-Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' after rejecting Iran’s proposal
item.description: ‘I would call it the weakest right now, after reading that piece of garbage they sent us.’

item.title: Carlton and coach Michael Voss part ways amid season from hell
item.description: The nightmare is over for the AFL great following two years of ferocious scrutiny.

item.title: Alpina's first car under BMW control will be a coupe concept
item.description: Alpina's new era as a BMW subsidiary begins in a couple days with a concept coupe that might head into limited production.

item.title: Mandatory hi-vis laws coming for NSW learner and provisional motorcycle riders under major road safety overhaul
item.description: The new rules will come into effect within weeks.

item.title: AFL officials stood down as second Round 9 timekeeping error emerges
item.description: ‘You just wonder how many more errors this AFL administration can absorb.’
